contentList.content: A quarterstaff crackling with arcane energy. Grants +10 to all skill checks and ability checks, +7 to initiative, +8 to saving throws, Lightning Charges when casting spells at close range, Chromatic Attunement, Arcane Enchantment, Arcane Battery, Spell Slot Restoration, Pearlescent Restoration, Mystra's Grace, Weave's Reclamation, Echoes of Netheril, unlimited Light, unlimited Shield and Counterspell reactions, Celestial Haste (free action), Spirit Guardians (free action, unlimited), Gimeitaro's Blast, Gimeitaro's Teleport, Gimeitaro's Barrage, and Gimeitaro's Shield (unlimited Silvered Bulwark).
Unlimited Knock as a bonus action.
Misty Step. Once per short rest.
Silvered Bulwark. Grants invulnerability that follows the target. Unlimited uses as a bonus action.
Artistry of War. Once per short rest.
Magic Missile level 3. Unlimited uses as a bonus action.
Unlimited Shield as a bonus action.
Arcane Gate. Recharges on short rest.
Call forth spirits to protect you. Nearby enemies take 3d8 Radiant or Necrotic damage. Unlimited casting, free action.

A longsword blessed by both Selûne and celestial Devas. Grants Wrathful Smite, Blinding Smite (unlimited), Light (unlimited), Shield of Faith, Celestial Haste (free action), Spirit Guardians (free action), Silvered Bulwark (invulnerability), Plane Shifter Slayer, Radiant Weapon (+1d8 radiant), Deva's Blessing (+5d8 radiant), Critical Bonus (crit on 19-20, reroll ≤2), Lathander's Light aura, and Moonshield Aura (Shadow Curse protection).
Unlimited Blinding Smite. Costs 1 action, no spell slot.
Call forth spirits to protect you. Nearby enemies take 3d8 Radiant or Necrotic damage. Free action casting.
Radiant spirits surround you. Free action casting.
Necrotic spirits surround you. Free action casting.
This weapon is infused with divine radiance, dealing extra radiant damage on melee attacks.
Toggled aura that grants immunity to the Shadow Curse.

Encase an ally in a radiant shield of invulnerability. The target becomes completely immune to all damage and gains advantage on all saving throws. The protective aura follows the target as they move.
A scroll inscribed with the Silvered Bulwark invocation. Encase an ally in a radiant shield of invulnerability. Single use.
A chest containing legendary gear for level 21+ characters. Contains the Staff of Gimeitaro.
